sidebar.noFiles: No attached or changed files yet.

workspace.signInHint: Sign in to see server-side workspaces allowed by ACL.

mcp.emptyHint: No MCP servers configured yet. Add one to expose extra tools to the assistant.
mcp.name: Name

settings.title: Settings
settings.modelProviderHint: Standard OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Chat providers still run through zspark's local bridge.
settings.mcpHint: Tools exposed to the assistant via Model Context Protocol. Each server launches a local process; toggle individually.
settings.entraHint: Entra ID only gates access to the shared workspace server. It does not provide model API keys.

search.title: Search threads
search.emptyShared: No shared sessions yet. Start a new chat in this workspace.
search.empty: No threads yet. Start a new chat to get going.

skills.title: Skills
skills.summaryDetected: {{count}} detected locally. Only skills returned by app-server can be used in turn/start.
skills.officeWarning: {{count}} office skill(s) found in plugin cache but not visible to this runtime.

activity.memoryFromThreads: Used memory from {{count}} thread{{count, plural, one{} other{s}}}
activity.compactedDetail: Earlier conversation context was summarized for future turns.

permission.defaultDesc: Safe sandbox, manual approval for sensitive operations
permission.fullDesc: Disable sandbox, silent read/write for any path/command
permission.planDesc: Architecture and reasoning, native read-only constraints

command.permissionDetail: The command output contains a filesystem permission denial.
command.failureNotice:
{{title}}.

The requested action did not complete. The command output shows a filesystem permission block, so success was not confirmed.

error.bridgeHint: zspark must run inside the Electron desktop shell. Reload the window if this appeared after a hot update.

main.fileUnavailable: File is unavailable or outside the allowed zspark directories
main.encryptionUnavailable: System keychain encryption is unavailable. Provider API keys, Entra tokens, and sensitive MCP env values saved on this machine will be stored in the app settings file.
main.apiKeyDecryptFailed: An encrypted provider API key exists but cannot be decrypted on this machine. Re-enter the key before saving provider settings.
main.entraTokenDecryptFailed: The saved Entra token cannot be decrypted on this machine. Sign in again before using shared workspaces.
main.mcpSecretsDecryptFailed: Some MCP server secrets could not be decrypted and were cleared. Re-enter these values before using the affected MCP servers: {{names}}
main.mcpEnvDecryptFailed: Encrypted MCP server env values cannot be decrypted on this machine. Re-enter those values before using the affected MCP servers.
main.duplicateMcpWarning: Duplicate enabled MCP server names are configured; only the first enabled server for each name will be launched: {{names}}
main.httpWarning: Shared workspace server is using plain HTTP. This is acceptable for a controlled demo or private tunnel, but use HTTPS before customer or production use.
main.entraIncomplete: Shared workspace Entra configuration is incomplete. Open Settings and fill Server URL, Tenant ID, Client ID, API Scope, and Authority.
main.entraNoToken: Entra login did not return an access token.
main.entraPublicClientRejected: Entra rejected zspark as a public desktop client. In Azure Portal, open zspark-desktop -> Authentication -> Advanced settings -> Allow public client flows -> Yes, then try signing in again.

emptyState.heading: What should we build?
emptyState.subtitle: Draft, review, automate. zspark works as your daily co-worker.
emptyState.starter1Desc: Summarize this week, write a Teams message.
emptyState.starter2Desc: Open a file and surface the key risks.
emptyState.starter3Desc: Five-slide outline for an exec readout.
emptyState.starter4Desc: Schedule a recurring task from natural language.

model.desc: choose what model and reasoning effort to use

ide.desc: include current selection, open files, and other context from your IDE

permissions.desc: choose what Codex is allowed to do

vim.desc: toggle Vim mode for the composer

approve.desc: approve one retry of a recent auto-review denial

skills.desc: use skills to improve how Codex performs specific tasks

review.desc: review my current changes and find issues

new.desc: start a new chat during a conversation

init.desc: create an AGENTS.md file with instructions for Codex

compact.desc: summarize conversation to prevent hitting the context limit

goal.desc: set or view the goal for a long-running task

side.desc: start a side conversation in an ephemeral fork

raw.desc: toggle raw scrollback mode for copy-friendly terminal selection

status.desc: show current session configuration and token usage

debug-config.desc: show config layers and requirement sources for debugging

title.desc: configure which items appear in the terminal title

statusline.desc: configure which items appear in the status line

mcp.desc: list configured MCP tools; use /mcp verbose for details

personality.desc: choose a communication style for Codex

clear.desc: clear the terminal and start a new chat
